summary: Iteration 22 - Tested new features: Beat Catalog Search/Filter, Social Sharing Deep Links, Pre-Save Campaign system. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/beats - returns beats list with total count
GET /api/beats?sort_by=price_low - sorts by price low to high
GET /api/beats?sort_by=price_high - sorts by price high to low
GET /api/beats?sort_by=bpm_low - sorts by BPM low to high
GET /api/beats?sort_by=bpm_high - sorts by BPM high to low
GET /api/share/beat/{beat_id} - returns OG meta data for beat
GET /api/share/release/{release_id} - returns OG meta data for release
GET /api/share/artist/{user_id} - returns OG meta data for artist
GET /api/presave/{campaign_id} - public endpoint returns campaign data
Frontend: Instrumentals page loads with search bar
Frontend: Filter toggle button opens filter panel
Frontend: Sort filter dropdown works (newest, price_low, price_high, bpm_low, bpm_high)
Frontend: Apply Filters and Clear buttons work
Frontend: Beat cards display with share buttons
Frontend: Share button copies link (clipboard API blocked in test env - expected)
Frontend: Pre-Save Manager page loads at /presave-manager
Frontend: Create Campaign button opens form
Frontend: Campaign form has all fields (release, title, date, spotify, apple, youtube)
Frontend: Existing campaigns show with copy/delete buttons
Frontend: Pre-Save Landing page loads at /presave/{campaignId}
Frontend: Landing page shows countdown timer
Frontend: Landing page shows platform links (Spotify, Apple Music)
Frontend: Subscription success state shows 'You're on the list!'
Frontend: Sidebar nav includes Pre-Save link
critical_code_review_comments: Beat search/filter implementation is comprehensive with 6 query params (search, genre, mood, key, bpm_min, bpm_max) plus sort options
Social sharing endpoints are public (no auth required) and return proper OG meta data
Pre-save campaign system properly separates public endpoints (landing page, subscribe) from authenticated endpoints (CRUD)
Pre-save landing page has countdown timer, platform links, and email subscription form
Sidebar navigation properly includes Pre-Save link with Megaphone icon
seed_data_creation: Test pre-save campaigns and subscriptions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested new features: (1) Beat Catalog Search/Filter - search bar filters by title/genre/mood/tags, filter panel with genre/mood/key dropdowns, BPM range sliders, sort options (newest, price_low, price_high, bpm_low, bpm_high). (2) Social Sharing - GET /api/share/beat/{id}, /api/share/release/{id}, /api/share/artist/{id} return OG meta data (public endpoints). (3) Pre-Save Campaigns - POST/GET/DELETE /api/presave/campaigns (auth required), GET /api/presave/{id} (public landing page), POST /api/presave/{id}/subscribe (public email subscription). Existing campaign: presave_90e40c235523 for 'My New Album'. Sidebar has Pre-Save nav item.

endpoints: GET /api/share/beat/{beat_id} - returns type, id, title, genre, bpm, key, mood, cover_url, price, og_title, og_description
GET /api/share/release/{release_id} - returns type, id, title, artist_name, genre, track_count, cover_url, release_date, og_title, og_description
GET /api/share/artist/{user_id} - returns type, id, artist_name, release_count, stream_count, og_title, og_description

authenticated_endpoints: POST /api/presave/campaigns - creates campaign with release_id, title, description, release_date, spotify_url, apple_music_url, youtube_url
public_endpoints: GET /api/presave/{campaign_id} - returns campaign data for landing page (excludes subscribers list)
POST /api/presave/{campaign_id}/subscribe - subscribes with email, increments subscriber_count
